title: SQL Function call bug
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE geo_test (id INT PRIMARY KEY, lat FLOAT NOT NULL, lon FLOAT NOT NULL, description VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO geo_test (id, lat, lon, description) VALUES (1, 34.0522, -118.2437, 'Los Angeles');
INSERT INTO geo_test (id, lat, lon, description) VALUES (2, NULL, -73.935242, 'New York');
SELECT lat, lon FROM geo_test WHERE lat IS NOT NULL;
SELECT lat, lon FROM geo_test WHERE id = 1;
key_bug_features: SQL function call with geographic coordinates
